steps.title: Identify the supplementary angles
steps.content: When a transversal cuts two parallel lines, the co-interior (same-side) angles are supplementary — they sum to $180^{\circ}$.

steps.title: Calculate x
steps.content:
From the figure, $x$ and the marked $28^{\circ}$ angle are co-interior angles, so:
$$x + 28^{\circ} = 180^{\circ}$$
$$x = 180^{\circ} - 28^{\circ} = 152^{\circ}$$
The answer is 152.
